properties.name: modempay.public-key
properties.description: ModemPay public key (pk_live_... or pk_test_...) for client-side checkout.

properties.name: modempay.api-key
properties.description: ModemPay secret API key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...) for server-side API calls.

properties.name: modempay.webhook-secret
properties.description: ModemPay webhook signing secret — used to verify x-modem-signature header.

properties.name: modempay.api-url
properties.description: ModemPay API base URL. Defaults to https://api.modempay.com/v1.
